inboxThreads.name: Maya Johnson
inboxThreads.label: Lead
inboxThreads.notes: Customer is evaluating reel scheduling, approval workflows, and cleaner inbox handling.

messages.text: Hi, I love the dashboard. Can I schedule reels too, or only feed posts?
Right now this workflow supports feed posts, and reel support is the next publishing format in the queue.
Perfect. I mainly need better caption generation and a cleaner inbox.
